sn38.13:1.1: "‘Bhavo, bhavo’ti, āvuso sāriputta, vuccati. Katamo nu kho, āvuso, bhavo"ti?
sn38.13:1.2: "Tayome, āvuso, bhavā. Kāmabhavo, rūpabhavo, arūpabhavo – ime kho, āvuso, tayo bhavā"ti.
sn38.13:1.3: "Atthi panāvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā, etesaṁ bhavānaṁ pariññāyā"ti?
sn38.13:2.2:
"Atthi kho, āvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā, etesaṁ bhavānaṁ pariññāyā"ti. "Katamo, panāvuso, maggo katamā paṭipadā, etesaṁ bhavānaṁ pariññāyā"ti? "Ayameva kho, āvuso, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo, etesaṁ bhavānaṁ pariññāya, seyyathidaṁ – sammādiṭṭhi … pe … sammāsamādhi. Ayaṁ kho, āvuso, maggo ayaṁ paṭipadā, etesaṁ bhavānaṁ pariññāyā"ti. "Bhaddako, āvuso, maggo bhaddikā paṭipadā, etesaṁ bhavānaṁ pariññāya. Alañca panāvuso sāriputta, appamādāyā"ti.
Terasamaṁ.
